mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, #{year}, #{mangName}, #{item}, #{dmX}, #{dmY}) ON CONFLICT (station_name) DO UPDATE SET addr = EXCLUDED.addr, install_year = EXCLUDED.install_year, mang_name = EXCLUDED.mang_name, item = EXCLUDED.item, dm_x = EXCLUDED.dm_x, dm_y = EXCLUDED.dm_y, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO sub_station_air (station_name, addr, install_year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y) VALUES (#{stationName}, #{addr}, NULLIF(#{year}, '')::integer, #{mangName}, #{item}, NULLIF(#{dmX}, '')::numeric, NULLIF(#{dmY}, '')::numeric)
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_station_air SET station_name = #{stationName}, addr = #{addr}, install_year = NULLIF(#{year}, '')::integer, mang_name = #{mangName}, item = #{item}, dm_x = NULLIF(#{dmX}, '')::numeric, dm_y = NULLIF(#{dmY}, '')::numeric, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE station_id = #{stationId}::bigint
mapper.select:
SELECT station_id, station_name, addr, install_year AS year, mang_name, item, dm_x, dm_y, tm, created_at, updated_at FROM sub_station_air
AND ( station_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR addr LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR mang_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY station_id
SELECT station_name FROM sub_station_air ORDER BY station_name
SELECT DISTINCT s.station_name FROM sub_history_air h JOIN sub_station_air s ON s.station_id = h.station_id WHERE h.data_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT h.station_id, s.station_name, h.data_time, h.so2_value, h.co_value, h.o3_value, h.no2_value, h.pm10_value, h.pm25_value, h.khai_value FROM sub_history_air h JOIN sub_station_air s ON s.station_id = h.station_id
AND h.station_id = #{stationId}
AND h.data_time >= #{startDate}::timestamp
AND h.data_time <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY h.data_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_history_air (station_id, data_time, so2_value, co_value, o3_value, no2_value, pm10_value, pm25_value, khai_value) VALUES (#{stationId}, #{dataTime}::timestamp, #{so2Value}, #{coValue}, #{o3Value}, #{no2Value}, #{pm10Value}, #{pm25Value}, #{khaiValue})
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_history_air SET so2_value = #{so2Value}, co_value = #{coValue}, o3_value = #{o3Value}, no2_value = #{no2Value}, pm10_value = #{pm10Value}, pm25_value = #{pm25Value}, khai_value = #{khaiValue} WHERE station_id = #{stationId} AND data_time = #{dataTime}::timestamp
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_history_air ( station_id, data_time, so2_value, co_value, o3_value, no2_value, pm10_value, pm25_value, khai_value ) SELECT s.station_id, #{dataTime}, #{so2Value}, #{coValue}, #{o3Value}, #{no2Value}, #{pm10Value}, #{pm25Value}, #{khaiValue} FROM sub_station_air s WHERE s.station_name = #{stationName} ON CONFLICT (station_id, data_time) DO UPDATE SET so2_value = EXCLUDED.so2_value, co_value = EXCLUDED.co_value, o3_value = EXCLUDED.o3_value, no2_value = EXCLUDED.no2_value, pm10_value = EXCLUDED.pm10_value, pm25_value = EXCLUDED.pm25_value, khai_value = EXCLUDED.khai_value
